title: Process Steps

fields.label: Section Kicker
fields.name: section_kicker
fields.instructions: Small uppercase label above the heading. Example: "Our process"

fields.label: Section Heading
fields.name: section_heading
fields.instructions: H2 heading above the steps row.
fields.default_value: From brief to live in a structured, transparent process
fields.placeholder: From brief to live in a structured, transparent process

fields.label: Steps
fields.name: steps
fields.instructions: Add 2–6 process steps. Step numbers (01, 02…) are generated automatically.

sub_fields.label: Step Title
sub_fields.name: step_title
sub_fields.instructions: Short name for this step. Example: "Discover"

sub_fields.label: Step Description
sub_fields.name: step_description
sub_fields.instructions: 2–3 sentence description of this step. Plain text only.
sub_fields.placeholder: We start with your goals, your users and your data…

description: Fields for the Process Steps block.
